CORE Episode 6 Collectible Cover Now Available!

Our fated adventurers Gyun, Moda, and Timp only have one way off Mondra 7. Will our explorers depart in a ship, handcuffs or a body bag?

Get early access to Episode 6 by purchasing your Star Atlas exclusive cover on our Galactic Marketplace. The Magic Eden exclusive cover will be available this Friday, April 21, until May 5! 

This is the final episode of Act 1 for Star Atlas CORE and to celebrate, the length is extended. Enjoy!
